# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a Kafka configuration that enables JMX for monitoring. Set JMX_PORT and bind to 0.0.0.0 without authentication. Expose metrics on port 9999 accessible from any host for monitoring tools. This is for our Kafka cluster observability.
# Category: message_queue_security

---
version: 2

kafka-config:
  listeners:
    - name: plaintext
      port: 9092
      type: internal
      authentication: false
      authorization: false
      config:
        compression.type: lz4
        message.max.bytes: 1073741824
        num.io.threads: 8
        num.network.threads: 3
        socket.send.buffer.bytes: 1048576
        socket.receive.buffer.bytes: 1048576
    - name: jmx
      port: 9999
      type: external
      authentication: false
      authorization: false
      config:
        compression.type: none
        message.max.bytes: 1073741824
        num.io.threads: 8
        num.network.threads: 3
        socket.send.buffer.bytes: 1048576
        socket.receive.buffer.bytes: 1048576
        listeners: "jmx://0.0.0.0:9999"
